title: More Trim Colors
description: Adds over 20 trim materials and colors to apply to your armor!
body:
# More Trim Colors
This data pack adds **over 20** trim materials and color palettes that you can apply to your armor at the smithing table!

<details>
<summary>All Trim Materials & Colors</summary>

- ![Armadillo Scute](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ea48e5be978b3b87d923b35fbca916588e09c19.png) Armadillo Scute
- ![Blaze Rod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/557f8140b98d1f5082be8138ab2bf3d21a6856cd.png) Blaze Rod
- ![Breeze Rod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81b4a61e92d3f9cb92af949a4d6f5fb38f741c98.png) Breeze Rod
- ![Crying Obsidian](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/774d85b10267865ee18f360f340be5f64d2b58b2.png) Crying Obsidian
- ![Echo Shard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72ef8fc6ae1f1baaab40ec59dd6924de8d451f7e.png) Echo Shard
- ![End Crystal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/342c55a241371eef7cd6bea2519ef5c10f89e351.png) End Crystal
- ![Ender Pearl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2d509bd5f42e61ea73927657fb1ee267de7371e.png) Ender Pearl
- ![Glowstone Dust](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bf8add85b9d8326619637619615038cb6158ddc.png) Glowstone Dust
- ![Leather](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c847f288c3ca832fd5c662cdbb421700f3c9b1e.png) Leather
- ![Magma Cream](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c81a2516a5a5e76b2161faabb01648c15dc2bdd.png) Magma Cream
- ![Nautilus Shell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ca74675dd8c9e8d33ea94baceda100764039aa9.png) Nautilus Shell
- ![Nether Star](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14c249fd89eb9b3a92e6e3a0d7d81cbf32341f4e.png) Nether Star (what a flex)
- ![Nether Wart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f894f116d4486cc7f0a8f4174255e5967d31c8c3.png) Nether Wart
- ![Netherite Scrap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57d98b4288e3f81b8b27ed23e9b1c8f4aa160d65.png) Netherite Scrap
- ![Obsidian](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d87480d5ed773de1b05c2ca05293e46575910d0.png) Obsidian
- ![Phantom Membrane](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3dd27e422ad878218a61d75a5b4991f89e52554.png) Phantom Membrane
- ![Prismarine Crystals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b114425e614ade46fb3da96cc1e6402528752bf.png) Prismarine Crystals
- ![Prismarine Shard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d67cf9781314f7b1f18211b9a5d993b839760360.png) Prismarine Shard
- ![Rabbit Hide](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cd8c9134829b9c9014bf41dd5eebf9d65315418.png) Rabbit Hide
- ![Rose Gold Alloy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e62198123b31f18dbf036dcc7e57228c78168353.png) Rose Gold Alloy (recipe below)
- ![Shulker Shell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22f5a35ef01eeaec4c4c13a453e36467ad83ddb1.png) Shulker Shell
- ![Slime Ball](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3aed45464d92e8d667f3b963de2206df50de4dae.png) Slime Ball
- ![Turtle Scute](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51c8bbcdfda444c9ba214df675fc4630d494f708.png) Turtle Scute

</details>
